description: A developer registered in an Apigee organization. Developers are consumers of APIs who register apps and obtain API keys to access API products.

email.description: Required. Email address of the developer. Used as the unique identifier.

firstName.description: Required. First name of the developer.

lastName.description: Required. Last name of the developer.

userName.description: Required. User name of the developer.

organizationName.description: Output only. Name of the Apigee organization.

apps.description: Output only. List of apps owned by the developer.

companies.description: Output only. Companies associated with the developer.

createdAt.description: Output only. Time the developer was created in milliseconds since epoch.

lastModifiedAt.description: Output only. Time the developer was last modified in milliseconds since epoch.

name: Apigee Developer
